summary: Comprehensive testing of Dashboard Summary endpoint (iteration_65) - all tests passed. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified - SummaryStrip renders 8 cards with correct values matching API, all data-testids present, all tabs working.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/dashboard-summary?customer_id=X - Returns all 9 fields (200)
Backend: Status counts (items_ok + items_low + items_short) equals total balance buckets
Backend: total_reorder_recommendations matches /reorder-recommendations total (2 == 2)
Backend: Empty/nonexistent customer returns all zeros
Backend: Item filter works - nonexistent item returns zeros
Backend: Missing customer_id returns 422 validation error
Backend: Status logic (is_short/is_low flags) matches balance table counts
Backend REGRESSION: Balances endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Movements endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Incoming supply endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Reorder recommendations still works
Backend REGRESSION: Item settings still works
Backend REGRESSION: CSV export still works
Frontend: Login with admin/admin successful
Frontend: Navigate to Inventory Ledger page

Frontend: inv-summary-incoming shows 400

critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 130-195: Dashboard-summary endpoint correctly implements derive_balances pipeline
Backend: total_items counts unique items using set(), status counts iterate over all balance rows
Backend: Reorder count logic identical to /reorder-recommendations endpoint (threshold comparison)
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 138-156: refresh() now calls /dashboard-summary instead of /customers/{cid}/summary
Frontend Lines 528-554: SummaryStrip correctly renders 8 cards with data-testid pattern inv-summary-{label-kebab-case}
Frontend: Responsive grid - 2 cols mobile, 4 cols tablet, 8 cols desktop (line 540)
seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (ID: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8) with 12 unique items, 13 balance rows (8 OK, 3 LOW, 2 SHORT).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Summary endpoint fully tested. Endpoint: GET /api/inventory-ledger/dashboard-summary?customer_id=X&item=Y (item optional). Returns 9 fields: total_items, items_ok, items_low, items_short, total_on_hand, total_incoming, total_committed, total_available, total_reorder_recommendations. Frontend SummaryStrip now shows 8 cards with data-testids: inv-dashboard-summary (container), inv-summary-total-items, inv-summary-ok, inv-summary-low, inv-summary-short, inv-summary-incoming, inv-summary-committed, inv-summary-available, inv-summary-reorders-needed.

new_endpoint.notes: Status counts are per-balance-row, not per-unique-item
